SeoMetaTags.Title: Big Night In
SeoMetaTags.MetaDescription: Shop online at Woolworths for your groceries. We’re here to help you eat fresher & healthier food, 7 days a week with low prices always.

Products.Name: Pringles Minis Variety Mix Potato Chips
Products.DisplayName: Pringles Minis Variety Mix Potato Chips 228g 12 pack

CentreTag.TagContent: 2 for $14.00 - $3.07/100G

Products.SupplyLimitMessage: 'Pringles Minis Variety Mix Potato Chips' has a supply limit of 2. The quantity in your cart has been reduced accordingly. To purchase a larger quantity, please contact us on 1800 000 610. Please note we do not supply trade orders.
Products.SmallFormatDescription: Pringles Minis Variety Mix Potato Chips
Products.FullDescription: Pringles Minis Variety Mix Potato Chips

AdditionalAttributes.ingredients: Sour Cream & Onion: Dehydrated potato, vegetable oils, wheat starch (gluten), rice flour, emulsifier (471), maltodextrin, salt, whey (milk), flavour enhancers (621, 631, 627), dextrose, onion powder, sugar, flavour (wheat), non-fat milk powder, sour cream powder (milk), acidity regulators (330, 270, 296), cultured non-fat milk, sodium caseinate (milk), yeast extract.
AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Pringles Minis Variety Mix Potato Chips is your tasty choice for lunch or picnics. It features a variety of irresistible flavours. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Pringles Minis Variety Mix with less than 100 calories per pack. Contains Original, Sour Cream & Onion and Salt & Vinegar flavours.

Your favourite Pringles Minis flavours, now available in a variety pack! Pringles Original, Sour Cream & Onion and Salt & Vinegar Minis are the perfect addition to any packed lunch box or picnic - or just when you're on the go!

Pringles Minis Variety Mix contains:
4 x Pringles Minis Original
4 x Pringles Minis Sour Cream & Onion
4 x Pringles Minis Salt & Vinegar








They're still irresistible and big on taste but they're mini!

Single-serve packs at less than 100 calories

Pop them in your bag or lunch box as a snack on the go!

AdditionalAttributes.allergystatement: Dairy Free,Egg Free,Fish Free,Gluten Free,Lactose Free,No Artificial Preservatives,Soy Free,Wheat Free
AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Experience Mount Franklin Lightly Sparkling Water lime. Pure Australian spring water, delicate bubbles, natural lime flavour & no sugar. Available at Woolworths online.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Mount Franklin Lightly Sparkling Water Lime, Multipack Cans 10 x 375mL

Mount Franklin Pure Australian Spring Water is infused with delicate bubbles and a hint of natural lime flavour. No sugar, sweeteners, no preservatives and low calorie. An icy cold refreshment, perfect to enjoy with family and friends or on the go. It's the perfect choice for those who want to add a little sparkle to their day. Available in mini cans and multi serve bottles

Australian Sparkling Spring Water

Hint of natural flavour

No sugar, no sweeteners, no preservatives

Perfect for drinking on the go

AdditionalAttributes.allergystatement: Dairy Free,Egg Free,Fish Free,Gluten Free,Lactose Free,No Artificial Preservatives,Soy Free,Wheat Free
AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Mount Franklin Lightly Sparkling Raspberry. A refreshing drink with natural flavour and no sugar, perfect for sharing. Order online from Woolworths today.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Mount Franklin Lightly Sparkling Water Raspberry Multipack Cans 10 x 375mL

Mount Franklin Lightly Sparkling Water Raspberry is pure Australian spring water infused with delicate bubbles and a hint of natural raspberry flavour. With no sugar, no sweeteners and no preservatives, it delivers a light, refreshing taste that is low in calories. Designed for everyday enjoyment, it can be enjoyed on the go, with meals or at home. Best served chilled.

No sugar, no sweeteners and no preservatives, made with lightly sparkling spring water.

Delicate raspberry flavour with a light, refreshing finish.

Enjoy on its own or paired with a wide range of meals.

Best served chilled for a crisp, refreshing experience

10 x 375mL cans, ideal for everyday refreshment, casual occasions or sharing.

AdditionalAttributes.ml_enriched_product_description: Discover Mount Franklin Lightly Sparkling Peach Cans. A refreshing drink with natural peach flavour, ideal for any day. Available at Woolworths online.
AdditionalAttributes.description:
Mount Franklin Lightly Sparkling Water Peach Multipack Cans 10 x 375mL

Mount Franklin Lightly Sparkling Water Peach is pure Australian spring water infused with delicate bubbles and a hint of natural peach flavour. With no sugar, no sweeteners and no preservatives, it delivers a light, refreshing taste that is low in kilojoules. Designed for everyday enjoyment, it can be enjoyed on the go, with meals or at home. Best served chilled.

No sugar, no sweeteners and no preservatives, made with lightly sparkling spring water.

Delicate peach flavour with a light, crisp and refreshing finish.

Enjoy on its own or paired with a wide range of meals.

Best served chilled for a crisp, refreshing experience

10 x 375mL cans, ideal for stocking up, gatherings or sharing with friends.
